description_long: This bungalow features a simple, rectangular structure with horizontal wooden siding and a flat, overhanging roof. The front facade includes a single door flanked by a large sliding door and a window, all framed in wood. The side facing the viewer in the second image has two large glass doors, likely serving as an entryway or access to a patio. The rear of the bungalow is unadorned, with only the wooden siding visible and no windows or doors. The final side view shows a single window, providing natural light to the interior. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, with a focus on practicality and clean lines.
description: A rectangular, single-story wooden bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and sliding doors. The design is minimalistic, featuring horizontal wood siding and simple, functional openings.
description_view_0: The front view shows a single door, a large sliding door, and a window, all set in horizontal wood siding.
description_view_1: This side features two large glass doors, likely for patio or backyard access, framed by wood panels.
description_view_2: The rear view is plain, with only horizontal wood siding and no windows or doors visible.
description_view_3: This side displays a single window, providing light to the interior, with the same wood siding as the rest of the structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
